Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
Shift drum 1 synchronization speed rate check
Shift drum 2 synchronization speed rate check
MAM or gearbox mechanic part 1 or clutch 1 synchronization failure
MAM or gearbox mechanic part 2 or clutch 2 synchronization failure
MAM or gearbox mechanic part 1 unexpected shiftdrum standstill
MAM or gearbox mechanic part 2 unexpected shiftdrum standstill
TCU high power supply too low
TCU low power supply too low

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: counter for launches in reverse gear
counter for shift lever in park position with vehicle velocity over treshold
counter for shift lever in reverse position with vehicle velocity over treshold
max value of clutch 1 energy for a single event
max value of clutch 2 energy for a single event
kilometers driven at temperature greater 0 degrees
statistic logging for the maximum input shaft speed 1
statistic logging for the maximum input shaft speed 2
maximum actuator position for clutch 1 touch point over lifetime
maximum actuator position for clutch 2 touch point over lifetime
minimum actuator position for clutch 1 touch point over lifetime
minimum actuator position for clutch 2 touch point over lifetime
counter for powerlaunches with full pedal
counter 1 for launches not in 1st or Rev. gear
counter 2 for launches not in 1st or Rev. gear
counter for change of active gear with correct passive gear decision
counter for change of active gear with wrong passive gear decision
counter for change of passive gear without change of active gear
counter 0 for engage actions with clutching before synchronizing
counter 1 for engage actions with clutching before synchronizing
counter 2 for engage actions with clutching before synchronizing
counter 3 for engage actions with clutching before synchronizing
counter 4 for engage actions with clutching before synchronizing
counter 5 for engage actions with clutching before synchronizing
counter 6 for engage actions with clutching before synchronizing
encoder value of shiftdrum 1 during last shutdown
lower position of shiftdrum 1 determined by reference drive
upper position of shiftdrum 1 determined by reference drive
encoder value of shiftdrum 2 during last shutdown
lower position of shiftdrum 2 determined by reference drive
upper position of shiftdrum 2 determined by reference drive
emergency request on shiftdrum 1 during last run
emergency request on shiftdrum 2 during last run
last executed reference drive sd2 was faulty
last executed reference drive sd1 was faulty
refpoint drift of shiftdrum 2 was detected during last run
refpoint drift of shiftdrum 1 was detected during last run
input shaft 1 speed error status for error storage
input shaft 2 speed error status for error storage
mileage counter since last LH occured
driving cycle counter since last LH occured
failure lights status (GR1 MIL CAN signals)
counter for rev gear engagement errors
Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors

Item.Text: Insufficient reaction on input shaft speed
Input shaft speed gradient too high
Clutch not closed leads to timeout
Value in service data too low
Value in service data too high
System not in normal operation mode

Data.Name: Shifting with paddles at steering wheel

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: WriteData.Reset clutch fricition shape coefficients Write
ReadData.Read clutch 1 friction shape coefficients Read
WriteData.Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction Write
ReadData.Read clutch 1 actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction Read
WriteData.Reset clutch 2 actuator load cuve adaptative value in closing direction Write
ReadData.Read clutch 1 actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction Read
ReadData.Read clutch adaptation control flag - Set clutch adaptation control flag Read
WriteData.Set clutch adaptation control flag Write
WriteData.Modify normalized clutch damage index Write
ReadData.Read normalized clutch 1 damage index Read
WriteData.Modify clutch position hysteresis compensation Write
ReadData.Read clutch 1 position hysteresis compensation Read
WriteData.Modify clutch torque hysteresis compensation Write
ReadData.Read clutch 1 torque hysteresis compensation Read Read
ReadData.Read clutch 1 friction general coefficient Read
WriteData.Modify clutch friction general coefficient Write
WriteData.Reset clutch 2 EOL completion status Write
ReadData.Read clutch 1 EOL completion status Read
ReadData.Read estimated engine torque offset Read
WriteData.Modify estimated engine torque offset Write
ReadData.Read max available clutch 1 actuator travel Read
WriteData.Modify max available actuator travel Write

DataItem.Name: counter for launches in reverse gear
counter for shift lever in park position with vehicle velocity over treshold
counter for shift lever in reverse position with vehicle velocity over treshold
max value of clutch 1 energy for a single event
max value of clutch 2 energy for a single event
kilometers driven at temperature greater 0 degrees
statistic logging for the maximum input shaft speed 1
statistic logging for the maximum input shaft speed 2
maximum actuator position for clutch 1 touch point over lifetime
maximum actuator position for clutch 2 touch point over lifetime
minimum actuator position for clutch 1 touch point over lifetime
minimum actuator position for clutch 2 touch point over lifetime
counter for powerlaunches with full pedal
counter 1 for launches not in 1st or Rev. gear
counter 2 for launches not in 1st or Rev. gear
counter for change of active gear with correct passive gear decision
counter for change of active gear with wrong passive gear decision
counter for change of passive gear without change of active gear

counter 1 for engage actions with clutching before synchronizing
counter 2 for engage actions with clutching before synchronizing
counter 3 for engage actions with clutching before synchronizing
counter 4 for engage actions with clutching before synchronizing
counter 5 for engage actions with clutching before synchronizing
counter 6 for engage actions with clutching before synchronizing

lower position of shiftdrum 1 determined by reference drive
upper position of shiftdrum 1 determined by reference drive
encoder value of shiftdrum 2 during last shutdown
lower position of shiftdrum 2 determined by reference drive
upper position of shiftdrum 2 determined by reference drive
emergency request on shiftdrum 1 during last run
emergency request on shiftdrum 2 during last run
last executed reference drive sd2 was faulty
last executed reference drive sd1 was faulty
refpoint drift of shiftdrum 2 was detected during last run
refpoint drift of shiftdrum 1 was detected during last run
input shaft 1 speed error status for error storage
input shaft 2 speed error status for error storage

Request.Name: ReadData.Read clutch 2 friction shape coefficients Read
ReadData.Read clutch 2 actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction Read
ReadData.Read clutch 2 actuator load curve adaptive values in closing direction Read
ReadData.Read normalized clutch2 damage index Read
ReadData.Read clutch 2 position hysteresis compensation Read
ReadData.Read clutch 2 torque hysteresis compensation Read
ReadData.Read clutch 2 friction general coefficient Read
ReadData.Read clutch 2 EOL completion status Read
ReadData.Read max available clutch 2 actuator travel Read

DataItem.Name: mileage counter since last LH occured
driving cycle counter since last LH occured
failure lights status (GR1 MIL CAN signals)
counter for rev gear engagement errors
counter for rev gear engagement errors

Request.Name: DataRead.Engine torque without GB request Read
DataRead.TRS status (P R N D) Read
DataRead.Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors Read

DataItem.Name: Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors

Request.Name: DataRead.Counter for 1st gear engagement errors Read
DataRead.Counter for 2nd gear engagement errors Read
DataRead.Counter for 3rd gear engagement errors Read
DataRead.Counter for 4th gear engagement errors Read
DataRead.Counter for 5th gear engagement errors Read
DataRead.Counter for 6th gear engagement errors Read
DataRead.Mileage counter since last LH occured Read

DataItem.Name: mileage counter since last LH occured

Request.Name: DataRead.Driving cycle counter since last LH occured Read

DataItem.Name: driving cycle counter since last LH occured

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests /Clip import: Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: Clutch continuous current feed adaptiont Start
Clutch continuous current feed adaptiont Status Request
Clutch continuous current feed adaptiont Stop
Clutch self open test Status Request
Clutch characteritics curve analysis and adaptation Start
Clutch characteritics curve analysis and adaptation Status Request
Clutch characteritics curve analysis and adaptation Stop
Clutch actuator position cycle control Start
Clutch actuator position cycle control Status Request
Clutch actuator position cycle control Stop
Clutch torque cycle control Status Request
Clutch actuator position control Status Request
Clutch actuator simultaneous position control Start
Clutch actuator simultaneous position control Status Request
Clutch actuator simultaneous position control Stop
Clutch actuator voltage cycle control Start
Clutch actuator voltage cycle control Status Request
Clutch actuator voltage cycle control Stop
Reset all Teach ins Status Request
Reference TRSin shiftlever position P Start
Reference TRSin shiftlever position P Status Request
Reference TRSin shiftlever position P Stop

DataItem.Name: Shifting with paddles at steering wheel
Shifting with paddles at steering wheel

Device.Name: Shift drum 1 synchronization speed rate check
Shift drum 2 synchronization speed rate check
MAM or gearbox mechanic part 1 or clutch 1 synchronization failure
MAM or gearbox mechanic part 2 or clutch 2 synchronization failure
MAM or gearbox mechanic part 1 unexpected shiftdrum standstill
MAM or gearbox mechanic part 2 unexpected shiftdrum standstill
TCU high power supply too low
TCU low power supply too low

Display.RequestName: DataRead.TRS status (P R N D) Read

Display.DataName: mileage counter since last LH occured
driving cycle counter since last LH occured
failure lights status (GR1 MIL CAN signals)
counter for rev gear engagement errors

Input.DataName: Shifting with paddles at steering wheel

Send.RequestName: Reference TRSin shiftlever position P Start

Display.RequestName: Reference TRSin shiftlever position P Status Request
Reference TRSin shiftlever position P Status Request

Screen.Name: Clutch Teach-in - TCU was replaced- Step 1

Label.Text: Note: The execution order of these operations has to be the following and must not be changed
Step 1: Copy Transmission Data via Tester
1.3.Take note of the 2 values for the clutch green flags.
1.4.Switch OFF the ignition and replace the old MAM with the new one
1.5 Switch ON the ignition and flash the transmission software in the new MAM
1.7. Set the green clutch flags for the new MAM
1.7.1. Select the clutch number= 1 and Modification type= "Set"
1.7.4.Set clutch 2 green flag on original value /Write the values obtained on step1.2
1.7.3. Select the clutch number= 2 and Modification type= "Set"
1.7.2.Set clutch 1 green flag on original value /Write the values obtained on step1.2

Screen.Name: Clutch Teach-in - TCU was replaced- Step 2 & Step 3

Label.Text: Note: The execution order of these operations has to be the following and must not be changed
Step 2 : TRS Shift Lever Position Procedure
If the routine is completed without errors, proceed with the next routine described on the following Step 3

Send.RequestName: Reference TRSin shiftlever position P Start

Display.RequestName: Reference TRSin shiftlever position P Status Request
Reference TRSin shiftlever position P Status Request

Screen.Name: Clutch Teach-in - TCU was replaced- Step 4

Label.Text: Note: The execution order of these operations has to be the following and must not be changed
Step 4 : RESET ALL RELEVANT CLUTCH DATA TO DEFAULT VALUE
4.2 Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in OPENING direction
If the routines are completed without errors, switch OFF the ignition and wait 5 seconds. Afterwards proceed with the next routine described at Step 5
4.3.Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in CLOSING direction
The following steps (from 4.1 to 4.7 ) should be performed for each clutch ( Clutch1 and Clutch2)

Send.RequestName: WriteData.Reset clutch fricition shape coefficients Write

Button.Text: 4.2 Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive-Opening direction

Send.RequestName: WriteData.Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction Write

Button.Text: 4.3 Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive-Closing direction

Send.RequestName: WriteData.Reset clutch 2 actuator load cuve adaptative value in closing direction Write
WriteData.Modify clutch position hysteresis compensation Write
WriteData.Modify clutch torque hysteresis compensation Write
WriteData.Modify clutch friction general coefficient Write
WriteData.Reset clutch 2 EOL completion status Write

Input.RequestName: WriteData.Reset clutch fricition shape coefficients Write
WriteData.Reset clutch actuator load curve adaptive values in opening direction Write
WriteData.Reset clutch 2 actuator load cuve adaptative value in closing direction Write
WriteData.Modify clutch position hysteresis compensation Write
WriteData.Modify clutch position hysteresis compensation Write
WriteData.Modify clutch position hysteresis compensation Write
WriteData.Modify clutch torque hysteresis compensation Write
WriteData.Modify clutch torque hysteresis compensation Write
WriteData.Modify clutch torque hysteresis compensation Write
WriteData.Modify clutch friction general coefficient Write
WriteData.Modify clutch friction general coefficient Write
WriteData.Modify clutch friction general coefficient Write
WriteData.Reset clutch 2 EOL completion status Write
